root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't have any delusions about being helpful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't turn my back on the comrades who supported me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't turn my back on the comrades who supported me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't turn my back on the comrades who supported me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if people say our Order's ideals are just fantasy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if people say our Order's ideals are just fantasy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if people say our Order's ideals are just fantasy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, I take it back about you being boring! You're nothing like that stuck-up brother of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now I can really go all-in on this game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Leonhardt? What are you doing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Leonhardt? What are you doing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Leonhardt? What are you doing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? Time to have a little fun with all the money I've earned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Time to have a little fun with all the money I've earned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Time to have a little fun with all the money I've earned.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is what I worked hard for. If not now, when do I get to enjoy it?

root.m_Talk_FRA: This is what I worked hard for. If not now, when do I get to enjoy it?

root.m_Talk_FRA: All right then, shall we?
